# 📡 ECHO FORGE RADAR: THE INSTITUTIONAL EDGE

Most traders see price action. 

We see **intent** before it moves the tape.

Echo Forge Radar doesn't react to the market—it predicts institutional positioning in real-time. While retail chases candles, we're tracking:

✅ Tier-1 accumulation zones  
✅ Smart money divergence signals  
✅ Pre-breakout institutional flow  

This isn't another lagging indicator. This is the same quantitative architecture used by algorithmic desks—now available on the SML Platform.

**Your edge isn't more data. It's better data.**

Stop trading blind. Start trading with institutional alpha. 🕵️‍♂️

🔗 Available now: scriptmasterlabs.com/radar
